---
title: "Methodological challenges in the analysis of voting advice application generated data"
author: "Mendez, F., Gemenis, K., and Djouvas, C."
date: 2014-01-01
description: "9th IEEE International Workshop on Semantic and Social Media Adaptation and Personalization (SMAP 2014), 142–148"
categories: [Applied Political Communication]
image: images_publications/conference.png
---
